title: ZREMRANGEBYSCORE
description: Removes members in a sorted set within a range of scores. Deletes the sorted set if all members were removed.
complexity: O(log(N)+M) with N being the number of elements in the sorted set and M the number of elements removed by the operation.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Removes all elements in the sorted set stored at `key` with a score between `min` and `max` (inclusive). ## Examples ZADD myzset 1 "one" ZADD myzset 2 "two" ZADD myzset 3 "three" ZREMRANGEBYSCORE myzset -inf (2 ZRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of members removed. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): Number of members removed.
intro:
Removes all elements in the sorted set stored at `key` with a score between
`min` and `max` (inclusive).

Removes all elements in the sorted set stored at `key` with a score between
`min` and `max` (inclusive).

ZADD myzset 1 "one"
ZADD myzset 2 "two"
ZADD myzset 3 "three"
